title: Build new decks in stages
summary: The accepted ADR turns creation into a staged flow: brief, structure, content draft, theme, and grounding.
note: This is the product direction that makes new-deck creation easier to follow.

cards.title: Brief
cards.body: Capture enough intent to propose a structure.

cards.title: Outline
cards.body: Approve the story before slides exist.

cards.title: Draft
cards.body: Create and style real content after approval.
